「口是心非傲娇毒舌大小姐青梅+都市日常+治愈救赎+双向养成+高甜+无系统无金手指+慢热养成文+双重生」
「徐大小姐：说最硬的话，撒最软的娇」
辛苦奋斗十年，却被迫娶首富家的“废物”大小姐……
重生回来直达幼儿园的白明彻底摆烂躺平，反正到头来结果都一样。
只是……这个傲娇毒舌的“废物”大小姐好像跟他以为的不一样……
-
“呐，我不要的，这些脏东西我不喜欢，都给你。”
“他是我的狗，打狗还要看主人呢！”
“我养大的，你们都不能欺负他！”
“哼，谁允许你上床了……去哪？回来给我暖床……”
“白明，你是我的，要是跟人跑了我打断你的腿……”
她凶巴巴的在白明身上划地盘，告诉所有人这是属于她的。
她会给他最好的，然后傲娇的说，“我养的，自然是最好的。”
过了一会别扭的说，“所以白明，你是最好的。”
-
小包子可爱的看向自己的爸爸，“爸爸，妈妈怎么追上你的呀？”
白明看着坐在窗边修剪花枝的女人，“她小时候坐在轮椅上，电动轮椅很快的，我跑不赢，就被追上啦。”
小包子：？？？
女人转头，漂亮的眼睛瞪了他一眼，“你爸瞎说，他可是我养大的。”
语气里满是得意。
白明只是笑，到底谁养","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cb38b71adff7b46d13f7d23c39f6e474","author":"麻辣兔头加点糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7482955777569737790","book_name":"我家青梅腰细腿长，嘴硬身子软","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":524,"name":"双重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=524&name=双重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7486025856251331134","read_count":"53672","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1441727"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"701","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,大小姐,双重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d01b5cd7a3a52a5dee767326edd675f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779303617&x-signature=EPWYWmFKYUfqS6s0B%2BcPPw3UgGQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1503729407766584","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220300172CA6D72763EE975896F6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12142,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10773},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time ":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7531257385157542718","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后面看着还挺甜的，女主性格变化不大，看着挺有意思的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753514638,"group_id":"7482955777569737790","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110222038906"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7482955777569737790","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"27"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6509,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":18},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7531239429303714622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的挺好的，五星支持一下。我觉得双重生可以一起重生，一个前一个后很割裂的，虽然设定上确实是一个人，但是思维方式生活习惯等等都不一样啊，看起来的观感和女主被人夺舍了差不多。[快哭了]","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"双重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774119617975896F6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227531239429303714622%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227482955777569737790%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753508233,"group_id":"7482955777569737790","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw+q1sk1IZqH110i0/iDE6U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":
